/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/detector.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/detector.dir/src/convolucion.cpp.o CMakeFiles/detector.dir/src/canny_manual.cpp.o CMakeFiles/detector.dir/src/morfologia.cpp.o CMakeFiles/detector.dir/src/contornos.cpp.o CMakeFiles/detector.dir/src/graham_scan.cpp.o CMakeFiles/detector.dir/src/douglas_peucker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/detector.dir/src/clasificador.cpp.o -o detector  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib /usr/local/lib/libopencv_gapi.4.5.5.dylib /usr/local/lib/libopencv_highgui.4.5.5.dylib /usr/local/lib/libopencv_ml.4.5.5.dylib /usr/local/lib/libopencv_objdetect.4.5.5.dylib /usr/local/lib/libopencv_photo.4.5.5.dylib /usr/local/lib/libopencv_stitching.4.5.5.dylib /usr/local/lib/libopencv_video.4.5.5.dylib /usr/local/lib/libopencv_videoio.4.5.5.dylib /usr/local/lib/libopencv_imgcodecs.4.5.5.dylib /usr/local/lib/libopencv_dnn.4.5.5.dylib /usr/local/lib/libopencv_calib3d.4.5.5.dylib /usr/local/lib/libopencv_features2d.4.5.5.dylib /usr/local/lib/libopencv_flann.4.5.5.dylib /usr/local/lib/libopencv_imgproc.4.5.5.dylib /usr/local/lib/libopencv_core.4.5.5.dylib
